findings.text: NAP-SRC-0019 is a rent arrears letter to Anfal Elbushra for £5,526.66, with NTQ date 18 May 2026 and payment required by 9 May 2026.
NAP-SRC-0029 is an email from Edinburgh Napier University to Anfal Elbushra attaching the 2025-26 Tenancy Agreement.
NAP-SRC-0019 OCR (tesseract, confidence 0.65) contains garbled characters and missing words; key details like dates and amounts are partially corrupted.
NAP-SRC-0029 OCR (pdftotext, confidence 0.85) is clean and complete; no extraction issues detected.

proposed_artifacts.content: OCR verification for NAP-SRC-0019 and NAP-SRC-0029 completed. NAP-SRC-0019 (tesseract, confidence 0.65) has garbled text and missing words; key data like rent arrears amount (£5,526.66) and dates (NTQ 18 May 2026, payment 9 May 2026) are partially readable but require manual review. NAP-SRC-0029 (pdftotext, confidence 0.85) is clean and complete. No redaction or risk flags. Proposed follow-up: re-extract NAP-SRC-0019 with a higher-quality OCR engine or manual transcription.
proposed_artifacts.title: OCR Verification Report for NAP-SRC-0019 and NAP-SRC-0029

proposed_tasks.instructions: Re-run OCR on NAP-SRC-0019 using a higher-quality engine (e.g., Google Cloud Vision or Azure OCR) to improve readability of garbled characters and missing words. Compare with current tesseract output and produce a corrected text artifact.
proposed_tasks.title: Re-extract NAP-SRC-0019 with improved OCR

summary: OCR verification for NAP-SRC-0019 (WhatsApp image, tesseract, confidence 0.65) and NAP-SRC-0029 (PDF email, pdftotext, confidence 0.85). NAP-SRC-0019 shows garbled characters, missing words, and formatting errors; NAP-SRC-0029 is clean and complete. No contradictions, redaction, or risk flags identified. Proposed follow-up: re-extract NAP-SRC-0019 with a higher-quality OCR engine or manual review.

uncertainties.text: NAP-SRC-0019 OCR quality is low; some characters (e.g., 'gdi;f;‘ulgsgaNaPief') are unreadable and may affect interpretation of dates and amounts.
